flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 43% at Multnomah University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (329 vs 577).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Multnomah University rose 27% between 2006 and 2009 ($7.5k → $9.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Multnomah University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.4k → $14.5k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Multnomah University rose 17% between 2006 and 2009 ($12.4k → $14.5k).
